Localization.Description: A user or group is invited to a group

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} invited a group to the group {object.storage.name} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to invite a group to a group on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} invited a user to the group with ID {object.id} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to invite a user to a group on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} invited a group to the group with ID {object.id} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} invited a user to the group {object.storage.name} on host {event_src.host}
